title: tricholepis chartolepis
intro: Tricholepis chartolepis, also known as Mountain Gold, is a flowering plant native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Tricholepis chartolepis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
